summary: Reframed the opening around Hester's labor and coughing so Chapter 17 enters through bodily action instead of repeating Chapter 18's bakery-first atmospheric scaffold. Core beats, supper scene, departure planning, and the overnight handoff into Chapter 18 remain intact.
edits: Reordered the opening paragraph to begin on Hester at the stove, giving the chapter a distinct first action and spatial anchor from the adjacent bakery-centered opening.
Preserved the storm-arrival aftermath, supper setup, and overnight departure staging so the transition into Chapter 18 still lands cleanly.
